name: add-component
description: Add a new UI component with proper states (loading/empty/error/success), variants, accessibility, and DS tokens — anti-AI-look defaults.

files.hint: Component file with TypeScript types for Props (use existing DS tokens, not literal colors/spacings)
Stories or example usage (Storybook entry or sandbox page) — covers all variants + states

checklist: Define props (typed, with sensible defaults; required vs optional explicit)
Implement loading state (skeleton or spinner — never blank)
Implement empty state (helpful message + optional CTA — never silent)
Implement error state (recoverable — show retry; not just a console.error)
Cover variants (size/color/density) using DS tokens, not literal values
Add a11y: semantic HTML, aria-* where roles are non-obvious, keyboard navigation, focus ring visible
Add hover/focus/active microinteractions for interactive elements
Avoid Lorem Ipsum / generic placeholder text in production-facing UI
Build, type-check, run a11y lint (eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y or equivalent)
